response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content from 00:00 to 04:59. 
2. Detected segments of fan messages (00:00-02:30, 03:10-03:35) and a static concert announcement screen (02:30-03:10). 
3. Detected a final segment of a darkened concert venue (03:35-04:59). 
4. Audited all segments for vocal music; none was found. 
5. Concluded that the video contains no vocal music, so no lyrics search or metadata resolution was necessary.
response.global_summary: The video shows a compilation of fan-made messages for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, followed by a still image of the concert announcement screen. No vocal music is playing in this segment.

scenes.description: Fan-made messages scrolling on a screen congratulating Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis on their 1st concert 'Drawn to Dawn'.
A still image announcing the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert with concert merchandise sales details and visitor attention notices. No music playing.
The video returns to the fan-made messages compilation. No music playing.
The video shows a dark concert stage with fans holding glowsticks. The 'Drawn to Dawn' logo is on the screen. No vocal music is playing.
